name: Nisha Mehta
message: The recorded lessons and final assessment made the learning path very clear. I could revise at my own pace and still track progress properly.

name: Rohit Bansal
message: The hybrid model helped me learn the theory first and then clear doubts in live project sessions. The classroom and recordings were very useful.

name: Ananya Rao
message: Live classes, reminders, attendance, and certificate tracking made the Ayurveda program feel structured and professional.
